text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross looks exhausted, so I have her rest
at the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for troublin' ya, Trainer. I'll rest up 'n be
back in shape before ya know it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Nnngh?! Where da heck am I?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama... Tama... I've been waiting for you...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oguri, is that you I'm hearin'? I can't see ya,
though. Where are ya?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Look up.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoa, you're huuuge! And what's with the get-up?! Is that a dinosaur onesie?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
In pursuit of greater strength, I grew to new
heights... I am now the Monster Umamusume,
Ogurin.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You're a... m-monster now?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We must do something. If we leave Ogurin to her
devices, Tracen Academy's food supplies will be
devoured!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So same as regular Oguri, then... What's all the
fuss about?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Presi—I mean, Commander! Squad member
Special Week has just arrived.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This monster is mine! A single blast from my Spe
Beam will take her down!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Beam? Whaddya mean, beam? How come ya gave it such a lame name?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Crunch, munch... Yummy! With the power of food, I have become... Special Ranger!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You'll be up against Ogurin alone... but I have
faith in you, Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What's goin' on here?! I can't keep up with all the
comeback opportunities!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not just gonna stand around providin'
comic relief! My Naniwa roots won't allow it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If these guys are goin' big, then so am I!
Graaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Gigantic Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Niiice! Check me out! I grew massive on sheer will
alone!

text_block_list.name: Gigantic Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Who cares about some monster raidin' the
kitchen?! I'm huge now!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ack! J-just a dream? And a wild one at that...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, at least I got myself outta playin' the
stooge. Plus my dream came true for a moment
there... so I'm feelin' pretty good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross seems to have gotten some
thorough rest.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm? You appear to be in a bind.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, aren't you... Tachyon?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Are your gags failing to provoke the reactions
you desire? Then, I have just the thing for you!
Behold, the "Gag Slapper 3000"!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
With the flick of a switch, this robot will—as you
can see—spin on the spot while flailing its myriad
arms! Now every groaner will be met with a clean
chop from one of this robot's countless hands!

text_block_list.name: Gag Slapper 3000
text_block_list.text: Bzzt! Not funny! Not funny! Not funny!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Geez. So much for givin' me a hand. This thing's
only got one comeback!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! You got me with that one.

text_block_list.name: Gag Slapper 3000
text_block_list.text: Bzzt! Not funny! Not funny! Not funny!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Turn that stinkin' robot off!
...Wait a sec, that was all just a dream?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I'm not feelin' very refreshed... Maybe it's
'cause I didn't crack enough jokes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after taking some time out to rest, Tamamo
Cross remains a little groggy.
